text_block_list.name: Elementary School Teacher
text_block_list.text: "Shakur is a very bright child. However, she has a hard time understanding that being correct doesn't always mean she's right..."

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Teacher
text_block_list.text:
"To be completely honest, the other teachers and I aren't sure how to
deal with her. She's completely isolated herself from her class. She's
even gotten in a few fights."

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Teacher
text_block_list.text:
"I swear, we're all doing our best to understand her, but... unless she
starts putting in a little effort to reciprocate, there's not much more
we can do..."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"I'm sorry, but she's always been like that. It's just who she is... You
don't have to worry about her. You'll only provoke her..."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Ever since I was a kid, I've always been some sort of enigma to others. No matter what I did, it was wrong because I'm wrong.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Whenever people spoke, all I'd hear was noise... We'd be speaking
the same language, but no one understood what I was saying.
Eventually, I gave up and shut up.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(That's when I discovered computers. It felt like I was hearing
someone speak for the first time. Turns out programming languages
were the only ones I needed.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(With a partner like that, I could make all the noise disappear.
Around that time is when I found the most effective way to prove
myself—as a student at Tracen Academy.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I finished Parcae shortly after enrolling, and they were the perfect
partner. The more data I entered, the more accurate the answer they
gave.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Just what is Air Shakur thinking... She doesn't listen to the teachers,
is generally uncooperative, and can be self-absorbed... But..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I don't want to run with Shakur at all... It's like she's from another
planet sometimes... It's scary. But..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "She's winning, so she's clearly skilled."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(...That was the best part. When I won a race, everyone would shut
their mouths, getting rid of the noise. So I decided to aim even
higher.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(If I won more, or better races... Yeah, if I earned a title only the best
of the best receive... If I could become the Triple Crown champion...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Then maybe, they'd ■■■■■■■■■■ ■■. Or so I thought...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After following Air Shakur from her practice, I find her standing in the
courtyard.
choice_data_list: Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's... you again. What do you want?
choice_data_list:
That run you showed off this afternoon was
something else.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah... Huh?
choice_data_list: It's clear you put a lot of work into it.
It's clear you put a lot of work into it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph... The hell? Where'd that come from...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is that all you came here to say? If so, good for you. Now hurry
up and get lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Of course that's not the only thing. I want to see her run more—get to know her more. I...
choice_data_list: I want to be your trainer!
I want to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it seemed rather sudden, but the moment I said it, I knew it
was true. I've wanted to be her trainer from the moment we met.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I don't see the logic in this. Ahh, did you fall for my run or
something? Then too bad, I refuse. I don't have time for baseless
proposals.
choice_data_list:
But the basis of our training relationship would
be up to you, no?

But the basis of our training relationship would
be up to you, no?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list:
Why don't you tell me what it is you're running
for?

Why don't you tell me what it is you're running
for?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What good would that information do? If you really want to be my
trainer, write up a proposal based on my skills or a goal.
choice_data_list: But if I know why you run, I can help you.
But if I know why you run, I can help you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
How? What could you possibly... What makes you think you'd do a
better job than me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nutrition, sports engineering... I've memorized countless essays and data sets. So tell me—how exactly are you gonna help me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You don't have an answer, do you? Spit it out. Truth is... you just want to be my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You want to be helpful. You want to be my savior. But truth is you can't do anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She throws her rejection in my face... but behind those harsh words
hides the information I want. I'm not backing down now.
choice_data_list: You're right, I haven't done anything yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: So where's your proof that I can't do it?
So where's your proof that I can't do it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, for crying out loud. Would you just—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...You know what? Follow me. I'll let the numbers do the talking.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: This is the answer Parcae lead me to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before us lies Air Shakur's precious laptop. On the screen, I see she's
opened up a program of some sort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There I see countless equations and variables—enough to fill the
whole screen. And at the very end, after the equals sign is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's the answer I got the first time I calculated everything, and it
hasn't changed since. By this calculation...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I will lose the Japanese Derby by seven centimeters, and with it, I'll
lose my shot at the Triple Crown. End of story.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown refers to three G1 races runners can only tackle in
their classic year: the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racers who win all three are known as Triple Crown champions.
Among thousands of challengers, only a select few have manage to
snag that title.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I... will never be a Triple Crown champion. No matter how many times
I run the inputs, the answer is always the same.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And don't try to suggest that the program's off. Trust me, it's not. I
can guarantee that... which means my loss is also... guaranteed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Do you get it now? Nothing you do can help me. If I can't fix this... no
one can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't truly understand how hopeless her struggle seems, but I can tell that she's still fighting despite that. And there can only be one reason as to why...
choice_data_list: You still want to win though, right?
You still want to win though, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is what I wanted to know—her dream. It may not come off as
special—heck, everyone has a dream—but as long as she has that...
choice_data_list:
As long as you keep that dream in your heart,
that number will change!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If dreams alone could change anything, don't you think that would've
happened already?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I know it's futile, pathetic even... But I've redone all the calculations again and again and again and again and AGAIN! Nothing changed!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I run and run... and run more! Just hoping... someday... But it... it
was all useless... And then you have the nerve...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: To just show up and act like you can change things! So go ahead... tell me how it'll be different with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur lashes out in anger and despair. Undoubtedly, her own
training is what lead her to this conclusion, and I won't sit here telling
her she's wrong... but...
choice_data_list: (But I still want my shot!)
(But I still want my shot!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, I think you get the point. And even if you don't, just leave
me alone.
choice_data_list: (...I need to get to know her better.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have rejected my offer this time, but for some reason, I don't
feel like giving up just yet.
